basic_details.job_title: Rajiv Gandhi University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Assistant and Field Investigator Posts
basic_details.short_information: Rajiv Gandhi University Research Assistant and Field Investigator Notification 2026 has been released on 14 July 2026 on the official website of Rajiv Gandhi University. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Rajiv Gandhi University Recruitment 2026 for the posts of Research Assistant and Field Investigator.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Social Science (Psychology only) with minimum 55% marks. NET/M.Phil/Ph.D for RA.
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Post Graduate in Social Science (Psychology only) discipline with a minimum of 55% marks having NET/M.Phil/Ph.D in the subject concerned. Experience in field work, especially in rural or tribal areas, is highly desirable. Good communication, interviewing and documentation skills. Willingness to travel and stay in remote field locations. Field Investigator: Post Graduate in Social Science (Psychology only) discipline with minimum 55% marks. Experience in field work, especially in rural or tribal areas, is highly desirable. Good communication, interviewing and documentation skills. Willingness to travel and stay in remote field locations.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- for Research Assistant, Rs. 20,000/- for Field Investigators

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Rajiv Gandhi University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Rajiv Gandhi University Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Rajiv Gandhi University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Rajiv Gandhi University Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Assistant: Post Graduate in Social Science (Psychology only) discipline with a minimum of 55% marks having NET/M.Phil/Ph.D in the subject concerned. Experience in field work, especially in rural or tribal areas, is highly desirable. Good communication, interviewing and documentation skills. Willingness to travel and stay in remote field locations. Field Investigator: Post Graduate in Social Science (Psychology only) discipline with minimum 55% marks. Experience in field work, especially in rural or tribal areas, is highly desirable. Good communication, interviewing and documentation skills. Willingness to travel and stay in remote field locations.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Rajiv Gandhi University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Rajiv Gandhi University Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What are the posts available in Rajiv Gandhi University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Rajiv Gandhi University is recruiting for the positions of Research Assistant and Field Investigator. There are a total of two vacancies available for these project-based roles.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The last date for interested and eligible candidates to submit their applications via email for the Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts is 20 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are there in total?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available in this recruitment drive by Rajiv Gandhi University. One vacancy is for Research Assistant and one for Field Investigator.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for these positions?
faq.answer: Candidates interested in applying for the Research Assistant and Field Investigator positions at Rajiv Gandhi University must submit their applications via Email.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications for Research Assistant?
faq.answer: For Research Assistant, candidates need a Post Graduate degree in Social Science (Psychology only) with a minimum of 55% marks, along with NET/M.Phil/Ph.D in the subject concerned.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for a Field Investigator?
faq.answer: A Field Investigator selected for the project at Rajiv Gandhi University will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month. The duration for this post is 6 months.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: Based on the official notification, there is no mention of an application fee for the Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts at Rajiv Gandhi University.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Rajiv Gandhi University recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Assistant and Field Investigator positions at Rajiv Gandhi University involves two main stages: initial CV screening followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for these project-based positions?
faq.answer: The job location for these project-based positions, Research Assistant and Field Investigator, is Doimukh, Arunachal Pradesh, as per the details provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. When is the interview date for these posts?
faq.answer: The interview for the Research Assistant and Field Investigator positions at Rajiv Gandhi University is scheduled to be held on 28 July 2026. Candidates should check the notification for specific timings.
